text: In the dimly lit corridor, I feel a sense of disquiet and anticipation. The darkness presses in, broken only by sparse, cold lights and the faint glow of screens and signs. The design of the space—glass, exposed pipes, and bold letters—reminds me of the boundaries between knowledge and uncertainty. Each step feels like a venture into the unknown, yet curiosity compels me to stay and ponder what lies beyond these closed doors and silent monitors.
